releases.name: Update to v1.1
releases.description:
1. IP records is now in a list ---> _list()_, that means you can log in server with different IPs in different cases.
2. Fix some logical mistakes.
3. Add multi-ip command, use this to append IP.
4. Update README and introduction files.

released in 2/3/2023

description.en_us: Check the player's IP to prevent impersonation of logging into the offline server
description.zh_cn: 检测玩家IP以防止冒名登陆离线服务器
